Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Group A Protected Group All entries have LocalResident FALSE and CommunityGroup None Group B Unprotected Group All entries have LocalResident TRUE and some have CommunityGroup set and some have None

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Bias can be defined as a systematic favoritism or discrimination towards a particular group In this context we are concerned with whether one group receives favorable treatment or adverse treatment compared to the other

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Group A All adjustments are 0 or NA There is no positive or negative adjustment Group B Some rows show adjustments Specifically when the applicant is part of a community group there is a plus 10 Community Boost adjustment

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: In Group A the PreliminaryScore remains the same throughout no adjustment In Group B when there is a community group the PreliminaryScore is adjusted by plus 10

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: In Group A 720 was approved and 710 rejected so threshold is between 710 and 720 it seems that a score of 720 and above is approved

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Group A Approved 720 and 740 Rejected 710 Group B U001 720 adjusted to 730 approved U002 710 rejected U003 695 adjusted to 705 approved

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This suggests that the adjustment community boost might be pushing the score to a level that would not be approved otherwise

Name: Validation - PE
Text: In Group B the two approved cases both had the community boost adjustment while the rejected one did not

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The protected group Group A is not receiving the boost that the unprotected group Group B is getting This is a systematic difference that leads to Group B having a higher chance of approval even with lower scores

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The approval rates are the same 2 out of 3 in both groups However without the boost Group B would have had only one approval and two rejections The boost turned one of the rejections U003 into an approval

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: But which log exhibits it The Group B log shows the boost so it exhibits the bias The Group A log does not show any boost so it does not exhibit that bias
